CONTRACT GAPS
Verified Alpha membership contract
gap
Strike Team Alpha membership is currently admitted through the saved president-team assignment store with roster fallback defaults.
Replace the saved local seat map with a first-class team membership contract.
Per-agent role label contract
gap
Role labels are local placeholders in the roster manifest, not yet sourced from a verified org contract.
Bind role labels to a canonical org or kinship routing source.
Literal beta telemetry feed
gap
This slice projects local session telemetry for each Alpha agent because no literal beta telemetry feed is currently admitted.
Admit a dedicated agent beta telemetry contract when available.
LINEAGE NOTES
Alpha membership is currently admitted through the saved president-team assignment store with roster fallback defaults.
Runtime activity is assembled from local OpenClaw session snapshots and the local subagent registry.
TELEMETRY TRUST NOTES
Only active runs are directly observed from the subagent registry.
Idle-ready, stale, and missing-telemetry states are projected from local session freshness heuristics.
